title: Kellmer Institute of Galactic History
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kellmer Institute of Galactic History''' was one of the premier history and government research institutes in the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

Funded primarily by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a [[General Ministry Institutes|General Ministry Institute]], the Kellmer Institute was responsible for a number of detailed reports on the history of the New Republic and was renown for its government, history and public affairs curricula. It maintained a branch office on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], which was built in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
